strengths: Proven Power BI and visualization delivery
weaknesses: No mention of Watershed or carbon tools
improvement_bullets: Integrated external vendor data (e.g., historical performance metrics) into centralized data warehouses, ensuring data integrity and consistency for investor reporting and due diligence.
Streamlined manual reporting workflows using Power Automate and Python, reducing report generation time by 20% and improving the accuracy of investor-facing deliverables.

Supported Master Data Management (MDM) initiatives by standardizing cross-functional KPIs, creating a 'single source of truth' that ensures data consistency across diverse financial reporting strategies.
Collaborated on sustainability data initiatives, applying analytical rigor to portfolio-level data collection and developing frameworks to support carbon accounting and emission reporting efforts.
Leveraged SQL and Power BI to translate complex raw data into actionable insights for high-stakes investor reporting, ensuring alignment with organizational transparency and ESG performance goals.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Associate, ESG Data & Investor Reporting opportunity with Ares Management. I am interested in this opportunity because of Ares' commitment to responsible investing and the opportunity to apply my technical background in data architecture to drive transparent ESG reporting. What interests me about working for Ares is its reputation as a global leader in alternative investments and its proactive approach to sustainability-related information, which aligns perfectly with my desire to work at the intersection of data science and positive impact. I believe my expertise in building automated data pipelines and my proficiency in translating complex data sets into stakeholder-facing Power BI dashboards would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by prioritizing data governance and pipeline efficiency. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I developed Python-based automation and standardized organizational KPIs, which reduced report discrepancies and created a 'single source of truth' for stakeholders. This resulted in a 40% increase in operational efficiency, a skill set I look forward to applying to Ares’ Master Data Management (MDM) strategies. Ultimately, I know that the Associate, ESG Data & Investor Reporting role at Ares would allow me to bring my technical proficiency in SQL and ETL to support ESG reporting and vendor data onboarding. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead enabled me to develop my stakeholder management skills. I successfully led cross-functional meetings to translate technical findings into business recommendations, effectively bridging the gap between raw analytical output and high-level strategy. This experience ensures I can effectively communicate with investment teams and validate data integrity for marketing materials. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my data automation skills in working on carbon accounting initiatives and investor reporting at Ares. I know that my background in building production-grade analytical pipelines and my experience with cross-functional documentation align with what it takes to succeed in this role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
